revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Game | Name=Boom! | Guid=3030-58075 | Deck=Boom! is a game where players blast balloons into smaller and smaller pieces until they are destroyed. | ReleaseDate=1991-12-31 | ReleaseDateType=Year | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Onomatopoeia_in_Title,Concepts/Single_Word_Titles | Developers=Companies/Bit_Corporation | Franchises= | Genres=Genres/Shoot_Em_Up | Locations= | Objects=Objects/Balloon,Objects/Gun | Platforms=Platforms/Gamate | Publishers=Companies/Bit_Corporation | Games=Games/Pang | Themes= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/2917493-screen%20shot%202017-02-05%20at%209.02.04%20pm.png }}
